gnomad.note: synonymous variant present in multiple populations at benign-supporting frequency

insilico.note: synonymous variant; missense predictors not applicable; CADD approximate

literature.title: Sequence variants of uncertain significance in BRCA1: implications for clinical management.
literature.abstract: Clinical-management reviews of BRCA1 variant interpretation emphasize that synonymous variants without splice impact and with population support are generally benign-supporting.
